---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new tool or an improvement
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Need**
What use case is not covered today?

**API area involved**
If known: the target vim25 method or REST operation (see `api-map/` and
`api-map/coverage.yaml` — the area may already be in the backlog).

**Expected permission group**
read / vm.power / vm.snapshot / vm.config / vm.lifecycle / cluster.ops /
host.ops / host.config — or a new group?

**Alternatives considered**
